usage: editDeselect [-help] [-area {x1 y1 x2 y2}] [-direction {H V 45 135}] [-floating_via] [-layer <string>] [-nets <net>*] [-physical_pin_only] [-regular_wire_with_drc] [-shape {RING STRIPE FOLLOWPIN IOWIRE COREWIRE BLOCKWIRE PADRING BLOCKRING FILLWIRE FILLWIREOPC DRCFILL None}] [-shield] [-shield_only] [-status {COVER FIXED NOSHIELD ROUTED SHIELD UNKNOWN}] [-subclass <string>] [-type {Regular Special Patch}] [-use {CLOCK POWER SIGNAL}] [-via_cell <string>] [-with_edit_flag {0 1}] [-object_type {Wire Via} ] [-from_pin <string> -to_pin <string>]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the coordinates for the area from which to deselect the wires.

options.name: -direction
options.description: Specifies the orientation of the wires to deselect.

options.name: -floating_via
options.description: Specifies only select floating vias

options.name: -from_pin
options.description: Specify the start pin name for deselect wire.

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specifies the layers from which to deselect wires or vias.

options.name: -nets
options.description: Specifies the net names from which to deselect wires or vias. ((net)*, optional)

options.name: -object_type
options.description: Specified whether to select wires or vias

options.name: -physical_pin_only
options.description: Specifies whether to deselect physical pins.

options.name: -regular_wire_with_drc
options.description: Specifies whether to select regular wires with violation markers.

options.name: -shape
options.description: {RING STRIPE FOLLOWPIN IOWIRE COREWIRE BLOCKWIRE PADRING BLOCKRING FILLWIRE FILLWIREOPC DRCFILL None} Specifies the shapes of the wires or vias to deselect.

options.name: -shield
options.description: Specifies whether to deselect the wires and vias of nets specified by -nets and the wires and vias shielding the nets specified by the -nets parameter.

options.name: -shield_only
options.description: Specifies whether to deselect the wires and vias shielding the nets specified by the -nets parameter.

options.name: -status
options.description: {COVER FIXED NOSHIELD ROUTED SHIELD UNKNOWN} Specifies the status of wires to deselect.

options.name: -subclass
options.description: Specifies the subclass name of the wires to be deselected.

options.name: -to_pin
options.description: Specify the end pin name for deselect wire.

options.name: -type
options.description: Specifies whether to deselect regular wires or special wires or patch wires.

options.name: -use
options.description: Specifies that only CLOCK wires will be deselected.

options.name: -via_cell
options.description: Specifies the via cells of vias to be selected

options.name: -with_edit_flag
options.description: Specifies whether to deselect the wires with specified value of property "isEdit" on the net
